/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g  -shared -Wl,-soname,libgtest_main.so -o libgtest_main.so CMakeFiles/gtest_main.dir/src/gtest_main.cc.o  -L/home/socrob/space_cobot_ws/src/space_cobot_controller/cmake-build-debug/gtest/gtest/src -Wl,-rpath,/home/socrob/space_cobot_ws/src/space_cobot_controller/cmake-build-debug/gtest/gtest/src:/home/socrob/space_cobot_ws/src/space_cobot_controller/cmake-build-debug/gtest/gtest -lpthread libgtest.so -lpthread
